text: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The topic of resuming negotiations on Ukraine is not a top priority. Russia is not imposing negotiations on anyone - Lavrov He noted that Russia views the possibility of resuming negotiations in Istanbul positively. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 恢复乌克兰谈判的话题并非当务之急。俄罗斯没有强迫任何人进行谈判——拉夫罗夫。他指出，俄罗斯对恢复伊斯坦布尔谈判的可能性持积极态度。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 BREAKING! UKMTO (United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations) reports an incident in the Gulf of Oman. Two IRGC gunboats reportedly approached a tanker some 20 nautical miles northeast of Oman and opened fire without issuing any prior VHF warning. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 突发！英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）报告阿曼湾发生一起事件。据报道，两艘伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）炮艇在阿曼东北约20海里处接近一艘油轮，并在未发出任何预先VHF警告的情况下开火。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ UKMTO Confirms: IRGC Gun Boats Approach and Fire on Tanker 20NM Northeast of Oman 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ UKMTO确认：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队炮艇在阿曼东北20海里处接近并向一艘油轮开火 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iran’s army spokesman said that during the recent war, more than 40 strategic military targets of the "enemy" in Israel were struck using drones and short‑ and medium‑range missiles. The "enemy" never dared launch a ground invasion due to the high readiness of the army’s ground forces. The army’s executive deputy said Iran fought on at least twelve fronts, not only against the U.S. and Israel, and that the 40‑day war changed global military literature. A senior commander warned that the enemy must bury any thought of a ground attack on Iran’s borders, adding: “We monitor enemy positions and will respond with ground‑force missiles, air force, artillery and combat drones if any movement occurs.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗军队发言人表示，在最近的战争中，使用无人机以及短程和中程导弹打击了以色列境内40多个“敌人”的战略军事目标。由于陆军地面部队的高度戒备，敌人从未敢发动地面入侵。军队执行副司令表示，伊朗在至少十二条战线上作战，不仅是针对美国和以色列，而且这场为期40天的战争改变了全球军事文献。一位高级指挥官警告说，敌人必须打消任何对伊朗边境进行地面攻击的念头，并补充道：“我们正在监视敌人的阵地，如果发生任何动向，我们将以地面部队导弹、空军、炮兵和战斗无人机进行回击。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, in an Army Day message, said the Islamic Revolution ended the era of imposed weakness on the armed forces. He praised the army for its recent heroism in defending Iran’s soil and flag alongside other branches, confronting the U.S. and Israel. He highlighted the air force’s drones striking "American and Zionist criminals," and the navy’s readiness to inflict new defeats. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊在建军节致辞中表示，伊斯兰革命结束了武装部队被强加的软弱时代。他赞扬了军队最近在保卫伊朗领土和旗帜方面与其它军种并肩作战，对抗美国和以色列的英勇表现。他强调了空军无人机打击了“美国和犹太复国主义罪犯”，以及海军准备给予敌人新的失败。 @wfwitness

text: Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh: Trump talks too much.
text_zh: 伊朗副外长赛义德·哈提卜扎德：特朗普话太多了。

text: Iran has not agreed to the next round of talks with the U.S. yet, citing U.S. pressure (including Trump’s naval blockade statement) and what it calls unreasonable demands. Iran says it will only continue negotiations if those demands stop, and has sent this message via a Pakistani intermediary. Source: Tasnim
text_zh: 伊朗尚未同意与美国进行下一轮会谈，理由是美国的压力（包括特朗普关于海上封锁的声明）以及所谓的无理要求。伊朗表示，只有在这些要求停止的情况下才会继续谈判，并已通过巴基斯坦中间人传达了这一信息。来源：塔斯尼姆通讯社

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Approximately 20 ships that attempted to cross the Strait of Hormuz have turned back, following recent developments in the waterway. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 继近期水道局势发展后，约20艘试图穿越霍尔木兹海峡的船只已掉头返回。 @wfwitness

text: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: Iran's valiant navy is ready to inflict new bitter defeats on its enemies.
text_zh: 伊朗最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：伊朗英勇的海军已准备好给敌人带来新的惨痛失败。

text: Burkina Faso Dissolves 118 Groups in Biggest NGO Purge Yet Burkina Faso: Ibrahim Traore's government dissolved 118 NGOs on Saturday, tightening control over civil society amid ongoing conflict & governance shifts. The move has drawn criticism from Amnesty International, calling it a flagrant attack on "right to freedom of association." READ MORE
text_zh: 布基纳法索解散118个组织，为迄今最大规模的非政府组织清洗。布基纳法索：易卜拉欣·特拉奥雷政府周六解散了118个非政府组织，在持续的冲突和治理变革中加强了对公民社会的控制。此举招致国际特赦组织的批评，称其为对“结社自由权”的公然攻击。阅读更多

text: BREAKING: A tanker about 20 nautical miles northeast of Oman was approached by two IRGC gunboats, which opened fire without issuing a VHF warning; the vessel and crew are safe.
text_zh: 突发：两艘伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队炮艇在阿曼东北约20海里处接近一艘油轮，并在未发出VHF警告的情况下开火；船只和船员安全。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 A tanker was approached by two Iranian Revolutionary Guard gun boats 20 nautical miles north‑east of Oman. The boats fired on the vessel without issuing a VHF challenge. The tanker and crew are reported safe, and authorities are investigating. At least two merchant vessels have reported being hit by gunfire while attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 两艘伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队炮艇在阿曼东北20海里处接近一艘油轮。这些船只在未发出VHF挑战的情况下向该船开火。据报道，油轮和船员安全，当局正在调查。至少有两艘商船报告在试图穿越霍尔木兹海峡时遭到枪击。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ According to TankerTrackers.com , two Channel 16 (the international VHF marine radio) audio recordings captured today confirm that this two Indian-flagged vessels were forced back west out of the Strait of Hormuz by Iran's Sepah (IRGC) Navy, with firing involved. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ 根据 TankerTrackers.com 的消息，今天捕获的两段16频道（国际VHF海上无线电）音频记录证实，这两艘悬挂印度国旗的船只被伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）海军强行赶出霍尔木兹海峡以西，过程中涉及开火。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇷🇺 "God Endured, and So Must We - But No One Knows Where That Red Line Is" Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov warns against those dismissing Russia as a "paper tiger." Russia has patience, he says, but that patience has limits. And the fact that no one knows exactly where the red line is - that, in his words, is a feature, not a flaw. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 “上帝在忍耐，我们也必须忍耐——但没人知道那条红线在哪里” 俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫警告那些将俄罗斯视为“纸老虎”的人。他说，俄罗斯有耐心，但这种耐心是有限度的。而且，没人确切知道红线在哪里——用他的话来说，这是一种策略，而不是缺陷。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Spectator Index Reports of gunfire targeting an oil tanker and commercial ship trying to cross the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 报道称，一艘试图穿越霍尔木兹海峡的油轮和商船遭到枪击。推文

text: WarTranslated Lavrov calls patience Russia’s key trait and says it’s good no one knows where their red lines end. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 拉夫罗夫称耐心是俄罗斯的主要特质，并表示没人知道他们的红线在哪里是件好事。推文

text: Faytuks News RT @_MartinKelly_ : A ships is cuurently under attack in the Strait of Hormuz by Iranian gunboats. It is likely the ship is an Indian Crude Oil tanker. Reason unclear at this stage. However, could be that the vessel did not have permission to transit. tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News RT @_MartinKelly_ ：目前有一艘船只在霍尔木兹海峡遭到伊朗炮艇的攻击。这艘船很可能是一艘印度原油油轮。目前尚不清楚原因。不过，可能是该船只未获得通行许可。推文

text: The Spectator Index Iran's deputy foreign minister says President Trump 'talks too much' and 'said contradictory things within the same statement'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗副外长表示，特朗普总统“话太多”，并且“在同一份声明中说了自相矛盾的话”。推文

text: The Spectator Index Around 20 ships set to cross the Strait of Hormuz were 'were turning back toward Oman after Iran’s military said that the waterway was closed', according to Wall Street Journal report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据《华尔街日报》报道，在伊朗军方宣布霍尔木兹海峡关闭后，约有20艘准备穿越该海峡的船只“掉头返回阿曼”。推文

text: 🇺🇦 A minibus was set on fire in Odessa. According to local social media posts, the minibus belongs to TTC, and the arson was carried out by a 16-year-old schoolboy. He has been arrested. The teenager claimed that he was promised $1500 for the job 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 敖德萨一辆小巴被纵火。据当地社交媒体帖子称，该小巴属于TTC，纵火者是一名16岁的中学生。他已被捕。这名少年声称有人承诺给他1500美元作为报酬 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇷🇺💬🇪🇺The EU advertises the fact that they have refused Russian energy as a success but no one shows the statistics — Lavrov "It shows how much more expensive the gas that Europe buys not from Russia but from the USA has become. How much Europe spends in addition…" 🇷🇺 💬 There is no one-sided dependence in relations between Russia and China, and the ties in trade and energy are balanced, said Lavrov. Other statements by the Russian Foreign Minister at the Antalya Diplomatic Forum: ➡️ The philosophy of Nazism is openly resurging in Germany and Finland, and Britain has always been close to such ideas. ➡️ One of the goals of the US operation in Iran was to gain control over the oil that passes through the Strait of Hormuz. ➡️ NATO is not in the best condition but Russia does not interfere in the alliance's internal affairs. ➡️ The idea of a new military bloc is circulating in Europe, which will include Ukraine, this new bloc will be aggressive. ➡️ Russia has many disagreements with the US administration on a number of bilateral issues and sanctions, and it's time to discuss how they see the future of economic relations with Moscow. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇷🇺💬🇪🇺欧盟将拒绝俄罗斯能源作为一项成就进行宣传，但没有人展示统计数据——拉夫罗夫：‘这显示了欧洲从美国而非俄罗斯购买的天然气变得贵了多少。欧洲额外支出了多少……’” 🇷🇺 💬 拉夫罗夫表示，俄中关系中不存在单方面依赖，贸易和能源方面的联系是平衡的。俄罗斯外交部长在安塔利亚外交论坛上的其他声明：➡️ 纳粹主义哲学在德国和芬兰公开复苏，而英国一直以来都与此类思想关系密切。➡️ 美国在伊朗行动的目标之一是获得对通过霍尔木兹海峡的石油的控制权。➡️ 北约目前状况不佳，但俄罗斯不干涉该联盟的内部事务。➡️ 欧洲正在流传一个新军事集团的想法，该集团将包括乌克兰，这个新集团将具有侵略性。➡️ 俄罗斯与美国政府在许多双边问题和制裁方面存在分歧，现在是讨论他们如何看待与莫斯科未来经济关系的时候了。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ Two Indian-flagged vessels — the VLCC Supertanker SANMAR HERALD (IMO 9330563), loaded with approximately 2 million barrels of Iraqi crude oil from Al Basrah Anchorage , and the bulk carrier JAG ARNAV (IMO 9705354) — made sudden U-turns near the southern approaches to the Strait of Hormuz (south of Larak Island) and headed back westward into the Persian Gulf. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ 两艘悬挂印度国旗的船只——装载了约200万桶来自巴士拉锚地伊拉克原油的超大型油轮 SANMAR HERALD（IMO 9330563）和散货船 JAG ARNAV（IMO 9705354）——在霍尔木兹海峡南侧入口（拉拉克岛以南）附近突然掉头，折返向西驶回波斯湾。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ Two Indian-flagged vessels — the VLCC Supertanker SANMAR HERALD (IMO 9330563), loaded with approximately 2 million barrels of Iraqi crude oil from Al Basrah Anchorage , and the bulk carrier JAG ARNAV (IMO 9705354) — made sudden U-turns near the southern approaches to the Strait of Hormuz (south of Larak Island) and headed back westward into the Persian Gulf. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ 两艘悬挂印度国旗的船只——装载了约200万桶来自巴士拉锚地伊拉克原油的超大型油轮 SANMAR HERALD（IMO 9330563）和散货船 JAG ARNAV（IMO 9705354）——在霍尔木兹海峡南侧入口（拉拉克岛以南）附近突然掉头，折返向西驶回波斯湾。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇪🇺 The EU advertises the fact that they have refused Russian energy as a success but no one shows the statistics — Lavrov "It shows how much more expensive the gas that Europe buys not from Russia but from the USA has become. How much Europe spends in addition to what it used to spend if it had continued to receive Russian gas via pipelines," — said the head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇪🇺 欧盟将拒绝俄罗斯能源视为一种成功，但没有人展示统计数据——拉夫罗夫：“这显示出欧洲从美国而非俄罗斯购买的天然气变得贵了多少。如果欧洲继续通过管道接收俄罗斯天然气，与过去相比，它额外支出了多少钱，”外交部长说道。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇨🇳 💬 🇯🇵 China has filed a formal protest with Japan after the destroyer JS Ikazuchi transited the Taiwan Strait, calling it a deliberate provocation. Defense Ministry spokesman Zhang Xiaogang said the move sent the wrong signal to separatist forces in Taiwan and would only harden Chinese resolve. Beijing urged Tokyo to respect the one-China principle and honor the four political documents underpinning China-Japan relations. The PLA Eastern Theater Command deployed naval and air assets to track and monitor the vessel throughout its passage. Chinese forces remain on high alert. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇨🇳 💬 🇯🇵 在日本“雷”号驱逐舰穿越台湾海峡后，中国向日本提出了正式抗议，称此举是蓄意挑衅。国防部发言人张晓刚表示，此举向台湾分裂势力发出了错误信号，只会更加坚定中国的决心。北京敦促东京尊重一个中国原则，恪守中日关系政治文件。中国人民解放军东部战区部署海空兵力，对该舰过航全程进行跟踪监视。中国军队保持高度戒备。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Hopefully we can mark you in yellow stars again too https://x.com/i/status/2045164219478204869
text_zh: 希望我们也能再次用黄星标记你们 https://x.com/i/status/2045164219478204869

text: 🇨🇳 China's 48th Naval Escort Task Force, comprising missile destroyer Tangshan, missile frigate Daqing, and replenishment vessel Taihu, is conducting routine escort operations in the Gulf of Aden and waters off Somalia as of April 17. In recent days, Daqing and Taihu have conducted anti-piracy drills in the Gulf of Aden alongside their escort duties. The Chinese naval task force remains committed to safeguarding international maritime routes and maintaining regional peace and stability, putting the concept of a shared future for mankind into practice. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇨🇳 中国海军第48批护航编队由导弹驱逐舰唐山舰、导弹护卫舰大庆舰和综合补给舰太湖舰组成，截至4月17日，正在亚丁湾和索马里海域执行例行护航任务。连日来，大庆舰和太湖舰在执行护航任务的同时，在亚丁湾进行了反海盗演习。中国海军编队始终致力于维护国际海上航道安全，维护地区和平与稳定，将人类命运共同体理念付诸实践。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇮🇷 🚫 🇺🇲 Iran has declined to participate in a new round of negotiations with the United States. ▪️ According to reports, Tehran conveyed this decision to U.S. officials through a Pakistani mediator. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045446386112409708/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇮🇷 🚫 🇺🇲 伊朗已拒绝参加新一轮与美国的谈判。 ▪️ 据报道，德黑兰通过一名巴基斯坦调解人向美国官员传达了这一决定。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045446386112409708/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Zelensky is ready to meet Putin. Why is he hiding, Sybiha asked a Russian reporter pestering the Ukrainian delegation about talks. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045445031721308189/video/1 Ukraine is ready for a leaders’ meeting in Turkey in a Zelensky-Putin format with Erdogan and Trump participating, Foreign Minister Andriy Sybiha says. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 泽连斯基已准备好会见普京。当一名俄罗斯记者纠缠乌克兰代表团询问会谈事宜时，瑟比加反问：“他为什么要躲藏？” https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045445031721308189/video/1 外交部长安德烈·瑟比加表示，乌克兰已准备好在土耳其举行由埃尔多安和特朗普参与的泽连斯基-普京形式的领导人会议。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Iran has once again closed the Strait of Hormuz, citing the continuation of the U.S. naval blockade as the reason. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045444821599265042/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 快讯 | 伊朗再次关闭霍尔木兹海峡，理由是美国海军封锁仍在继续。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045444821599265042/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical A bit of chaos in Hormuz this morning as nearly all of the outbound tankers have abruptly turned around. Follows an announcement by Iranian military leadership that the Strait has "reverted to its previous state of strict military control." https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045443608749175166/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 今天早上霍尔木兹海峡出现了一些混乱，几乎所有出境油轮都突然掉头。此前伊朗军方领导层宣布，海峡“已恢复到之前的严格军事管制状态”。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045443608749175166/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Ukraine's General Staff confirmed overnight strikes on four Russian oil facilities. Fires are burning at the Novokuibyshevsky and Syzransky refineries in Samara region, the RPC-Vysotsk Lukoil-2 terminal in Leningrad region, and the Tikhoretsk pumping station in Krasnodar Krai. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045442774992834681/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰总参谋部证实，夜间对四个俄罗斯石油设施进行了打击。萨马拉地区的诺沃库比舍夫斯基和塞兹兰炼油厂、列宁格勒地区的卢克石油公司RPC-Vysotsk-2码头以及克拉斯诺达尔边疆区的季霍列茨克泵站发生火灾。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045442774992834681/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Ukrainian attack drones scored multiple hits on Russia's Syzran oil refinery this morning, setting the facility ablaze. Seen here, pillars of smoke rise from the Russian refinery. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045441322832523759/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 乌克兰攻击无人机今天早上多次击中俄罗斯塞兹兰炼油厂，导致该设施起火。如图所示，浓烟从俄罗斯炼油厂升起。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045441322832523759/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇷🇺🇸The IRGC Navy warned that the U.S. will be met with a fitting response for each breach of the deal to open the Strait of Hormuz. They added that the Strait of Hormuz will remain closed for as long as vessels coming to and from Iran remain under threat.…" ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Out going tankers seemed have mostly all turned around after approaching the Strait of Hormuz to cross this morning after the announcement that the Strait of Hormuz was closed again. However, U.S. sanctioned vessels have been able to successfully transit the Strait (media 2). @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇷🇺🇸伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军警告称，美国每违反一次开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议，都将遭到适当的回应。他们补充说，只要往返伊朗的船只仍受到威胁，霍尔木兹海峡就将保持关闭……” ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 在宣布霍尔木兹海峡再次关闭后，今天早上接近海峡准备通过的出境油轮似乎大多已经掉头。然而，受美国制裁的船只已成功通过海峡（媒体 2）。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 "We warned you, but you ignored it." - Ebrahim Azizi, head of Iran's National Security and Foreign Policy Commission 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “我们警告过你们，但你们无视了。”——伊朗国家安全与外交政策委员会主席易卜拉欣·阿齐兹 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Secretary of the Airlines Companies Association of Iran Maqsoud Asadi-Samani announced that the Mehrabad, Imam (RA), Mashhad, Birjand, Gorgan, and Zahedan airports have been reopened today. Iranian airlines are also preparing to resume domestic and international flights with Ma'raj Airlines announcing that flights to Istanbul will resume tomorrow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗航空公司协会秘书马格苏德·阿萨迪-萨马尼宣布，梅赫拉巴德机场、伊玛目（RA）机场、马什哈德机场、比尔詹德机场、戈尔甘机场和扎黑丹机场已于今日重新开放。伊朗各航空公司也正准备恢复国内和国际航班，其中马汉航空（Ma'raj Airlines）宣布将于明日恢复飞往伊斯坦布尔的航班。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Tasnim News Agency Report: Iran has not yet agreed to the next round of negotiations with the US. ▪️ According to Tasnim sources, due to Trump’s announcement of a naval blockade on Iran and continued excessive US demands in recent messages, Iran has refused the next round of talks for now. ▪️ Iran has stressed that stopping American excessive demands is a key condition for continuing negotiations; otherwise, it will not engage in time-wasting talks. ▪️ This position was conveyed to the US via Pakistani intermediaries. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 塔斯尼姆通讯社报道：伊朗尚未同意与美国进行下一轮谈判。 ▪️ 据塔斯尼姆通讯社消息来源称，由于特朗普宣布对伊朗实施海上封锁，且美国在近期的信息中继续提出过分要求，伊朗目前已拒绝进行下一轮会谈。 ▪️ 伊朗强调，停止美国的过分要求是继续谈判的关键条件；否则，伊朗将不会参与浪费时间的谈判。 ▪️ 这一立场已通过巴基斯坦中间人传达给美国。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: “Enough!” Trump Stuns Zionist Supporters by Scolding Israel Over Lebanon Trump shocked his Zionist allies on Friday, declaring he had “barred” Israel from bombing Lebanon after the ceasefire. “Enough is enough!”, he further rebuked Israel. Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu said he accepted the truce at the “request” of his “friend” Trump. READ MORE
text_zh: “够了！”特朗普因黎巴嫩问题训斥以色列，震惊其犹太复国主义支持者。周五，特朗普震惊了他的犹太复国主义盟友，宣布他已“禁止”以色列在停火后轰炸黎巴嫩。“够了就是够了！”，他进一步斥责以色列。以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他是在其“朋友”特朗普的“请求”下接受停火的。阅读更多

text: 🇮🇷 Most of the tankers transiting the Strait of Hormuz this morning are all linked to Iran/Russia/China & US-sanctioned. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 今天早上通过霍尔木兹海峡的大多数油轮都与伊朗/俄罗斯/中国有关，并受到美国制裁。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 💬 We're not even in the middle, we're just at the beginning of the path to a multipolar world — Lavrov This will be a historic, painful era, because we will have to abandon old habits, he added 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 我们甚至还没有走到中间，我们只是处于通往多极世界道路的起点 —— 拉夫罗夫。他补充说，这将是一个历史性的、痛苦的时代，因为我们将不得不放弃旧习惯。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Head of the National Security and Foreign Policy Commission of the Iranian Parliament Ebrahim Azizi on X: "We warned you, bu you ignored it." 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇷🇺 🔹 The Russian Armed Forces struck at energy and transport infrastructure facilities in Ukraine, as well as storage and launch sites for long-range UAVs, the Russian Defense Ministry reported. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🔹 俄罗斯国防部报告称，俄罗斯武装部队打击了乌克兰的能源和交通基础设施，以及远程无人机的储存和发射点。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇷🇺🇸 Spokesperson Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters Ebrahim Zolfaghari announced that the Strait of Hormuz has been closed to shipping due to the ongoing US naval blockade, hinting that it will remain closed for as long as the blockade is in play.…" ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The IRGC Navy warned that the U.S. will be met with a fitting response for each breach of the deal to open the Strait of Hormuz. They added that the Strait of Hormuz will remain closed for as long as vessels coming to and from Iran remain under threat. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人易卜拉欣·佐尔法加里宣布，由于美国持续的海军封锁，霍尔木兹海峡已对航运关闭，并暗示只要封锁还在，它将保持关闭……” ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊斯兰革命卫队海军警告称，美国对每一次违反开放霍尔木兹海峡协议的行为都将受到相应的回应。他们补充说，只要往返伊朗的船只仍受到威胁，霍尔木兹海峡将保持关闭。@wfwitness

text: WarTranslated Border Guard drone pilots from RUBpAK Prime destroyed enemy vehicles, comms gear, dugouts and shelters in the Northern Slobozhansky sector. The occupiers also suffered significant manpower losses, the unit says. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045439394966802602/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 来自RUBpAK Prime的边防无人机飞行员在北部斯洛博然斯克地区摧毁了敌方车辆、通讯设备、掩体和避难所。该部队称，占领者也遭受了重大人员损失。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045439394966802602/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Putin’s special envoy Dmitriev claims the new 30-day extension letting Russian oil in transit bypass sanctions covers over 100 million barrels again. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045435116437016659/photo/1 US has extended the waiver allowing countries to buy sanctioned Russian oil until May 16, Reuters reports. https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-extends-waiver-allowing-countries-buy-russian-oil-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045401896743993680/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 普京的特使德米特里耶夫声称，允许过境俄罗斯石油绕过制裁的30天新延期再次涵盖了超过1亿桶石油。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045435116437016659/photo/1 据路透社报道，美国已将允许各国购买受制裁俄罗斯石油的豁免期延长至5月16日。https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-extends-waiver-allowing-countries-buy-russian-oil-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045401896743993680/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran has not yet agreed to the next round of negotiations with the US due to the maritime blockade and excessive demands - Tasnim. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 由于海上封锁和过分要求，伊朗尚未同意与美国进行下一轮谈判 - 塔斯尼姆通讯社。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 The Strait of Hormuz was not blocked and will not be blocked. Commercial ships can pass through it under Iranian control, NTV quoted the deputy head of the Islamic Republic's Foreign Ministry, Khatibzadeh, as saying. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 霍尔木兹海峡没有被封锁，也不会被封锁。据NTV援引伊朗伊斯兰共和国外交部副部长哈提卜扎德的话称，商业船只可以在伊朗的控制下通过该海峡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Tasnim News Agency: Iran has not yet agreed to the next round of negotiations with the United States. Tehran cited U.S. President Trump’s announcement of a continued naval blockade on the Strait of Hormuz and “excessive demands” by the US in the talks. Iran has informed Washington through the Pakistani mediator that it will not waste time on drawn‑out and futile negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗尚未同意与美国进行下一轮谈判。德黑兰方面援引了美国总统特朗普关于继续对霍尔木兹海峡实施海上封锁的声明，以及美国在谈判中提出的“过分要求”。伊朗已通过巴基斯坦调解人告知华盛顿，它不会在旷日持久且徒劳的谈判上浪费时间。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Strait of Hormuz tanker traffic update (last few hours): • CRAVE (IMO: 9045807) – LPG/Chemical Tanker 🇲🇱 • GARDIAN (IMO: 9114581) – LPG Tanker 🇦🇴 • TORIN (IMO: 9281566) – Oil/Chemical Tanker 🇵🇦 • RAINE (IMO: 9223540) – LPG Tanker 🇬🇳 • NV AQUAMARINE (IMO: 9307736) – LPG Tanker 🇻🇳 Note: These Tankers are U.S. OFAC Sanctioned (Shadow Fleet) 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: The Spectator Index In effect, the Iranian military has closed the Strait of Hormuz again, saying the US must lift the blockade before the Strait is re-opened. tweet
text_zh: 《旁观者指数》：实际上，伊朗军方再次关闭了霍尔木兹海峡，称美国必须先解除封锁，海峡才会重新开放。推文
